name: alpha_001_qrevmix
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(ebitda, enterprise_value), 252)), add(ts_zscore(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, 252), ts_zscore(divide(subtract(cash, debt), enterprise_value), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 4), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_002_epscf_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(eps, close), 252), ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252)), add(ts_zscore(earnings_certainty_rank_derivative, 252), ts_zscore(divide(bookvalue_ps, close), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_003_stable_quality
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(subtract(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(ts_std_dev(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 126), 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(composite_factor_score_derivative, 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 8), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_004_sales_cash_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(est_sales, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(est_cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252)), add(ts_zscore(cashflow_efficiency_rank_derivative, 252), ts_zscore(divide(subtract(cash, debt), enterprise_value), 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 5), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_005_analyst_value_rev
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(est_ebitda, enterprise_value), 252)), add(ts_zscore(analyst_revision_rank_derivative, 252), ts_zscore(earnings_certainty_rank_derivative, 252)))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 7), close)), subindustry))

name: alpha_006_defensive_quality
expr: add(group_rank(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, enterprise_value), 252), ts_zscore(divide(cash, assets), 252)), add(ts_zscore(divide(est_netprofit, enterprise_value), 252), subtract(0, ts_zscore(beta_last_60_days_spy, 252))))), subindustry), group_rank(rank(subtract(ts_mean(close, 6), close)), subindustry))
